title: fix tutorial instructions
body:
Before, there is no `$newcontainer` image committed thus
`podman run $newcontainer` attempts to pull `$newcontainer` from the various
container registries.

I have followed the tutorials but I have encountered an issue similar to [here](https://www.reddit.com/r/podman/comments/bp3sdq/buildah_tutorial_issue_with_podman_on_centos_7/).

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
@basilrabi we require that the commits can be signed.  When you touch up the instructions per the review comments, could you do `git commit --amend -s` and then repush please?
Thanks @basilrabi, I just want one small change to your PR and then it is good to go.

:pushpin: Commit 645611b has been approved by `TomSweeneyRedHat`
